name: goodness-high-school-sms
description: Comprehensive Nigerian School Management System with Super Admin

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run backend:install && npm run frontend:install
scripts.migrate: docker-compose exec backend npm run migrate
scripts.seed: docker-compose exec backend npm run seed
scripts.lint: docker-compose exec backend npm run lint
scripts.format: docker-compose exec backend npm run format

author: DARKBYTE1
